title: Red Hand Squadron

{{Quote|Several transmissions were beamed to this ship by spies who are now unfortunately dead.|Darth Vader|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 1">[[Star Wars (1977) 1|''Star Wars'' (1977) 1]]</ref>}}
'''Red Hand Squadron''' was a team of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] and [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] (called [[Crimson Fury]]) established by [[Bria Tharen]] whose primary goal was the liberation of [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]].<ref name="TCSWE" /> Tharen founded the team as part of the developing Alliance and as a reaction to her experiences on [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]]. Although Red Hand Squadron did not primarily attack [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces, they earned a reputation for effectiveness and a brutality not often found in the Alliance.

[[File:BriaTharenRebel.jpg|thumb|left|250px|[[Bria Tharen]], leader of the Red Hand Squadron, oversees an [[Star Wars: Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika|operation]] personally.]]
Tharen proved to be a capable and adept commander, demanding nothing less than excellence from her troops. Red Hand Squadron attacked and captured the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Emancipator (CR90 corvette)|''Helot's Shackle'']],<ref name="TCSWE" /> which was full of [[Exultation]]-addicted slaves from Ylesia. The boarding was fierce and violent, and numerous Rebels [[Death/Legends|died]] along with dozens of slavers. Tharen herself killed the captain when he refused to surrender. The ship was recommissioned [[Emancipator (CR90 corvette)|''Emancipator'']] at Tharen's suggestion.

Red Hand Squadron was also key to the [[Battle of Ylesia]],<ref name="TCSWE" /> but that would lead to the undoing of the squadron. The battle proved to be far more difficult than expected, and Tharen's betrayal of the [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] helping her left a bad taste in everyone's mouth. Even her one-time lover, [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], grew to hate her. Solo and Tharen parted on bad terms after the battle.

Red Hand Squadron would make its [[Battle of Toprawa|final stand]] on [[Toprawa/Legends|Toprawa]]. There they were tasked with taking and holding an Imperial communications center long enough for the stolen [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] [[Death Star plans/Legends|plans]] to be beamed to the corvette [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']],<ref name="TCSWE" /> which 'happened to be passing through the system'. The mission was successful, but the squadron took heavy casualties, and their positions were subsequently overrun by the Imperial counterattack. Rather than face capture and [[Torture/Legends|torture]] at Imperial hands, [[Bria Tharen|Tharen]] and the small group of Rebel survivors swallowed poison pills. Red Hand Squadron was disbanded after the Toprawa mission.

Members of Red Hand Squadron wore a crimson insignia shaped like a [[Blood/Legends|blood]]-dripping hand on their uniforms, helmets, [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], and capital ships.<ref name="TCSWE" />
